name: patch-the-web
description: A safe, community repair layer for websites users do not own.

scripts.build: npm run build:site && npm run build:extension
scripts.capture:previews: node scripts/build-test-runtime.mjs && node scripts/capture-previews.mjs && node scripts/generate-brand-assets.mjs
scripts.test:extension: npm run build:extension && playwright test --config playwright.extension.config.ts
scripts.check: tsc --noEmit && npm test && npm run build
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm run validate:patch -- src/registry/patches/civic-apply.patch-the-web.json src/site/demo/index.html && npm run validate:patch -- src/registry/patches/metrocare-service-navigator.patch-the-web.json src/site/care/index.html && npm run validate:patch -- src/registry/patches/nu-karachi-degree-programs.patch-the-web.json tests/fixtures/nu-degree-programs.html && npm run validate:patch -- src/registry/patches/hec-campus-finder.patch-the-web.json tests/fixtures/hec-recognized-campuses.html && npm run test:browser && npm run test:extension
